requirement_topic.en: AC EV Charging Connector Standard — IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (GCC / Saudi Practice)
requirement_topic.zh: 交流电动汽车充电接口标准——IEC 62196-2 Type 2（海湾合作委员会/沙特做法）
requirement_topic.zht: 交流電動汽車充電接口標準——IEC 62196-2 Type 2（海灣合作委員會/沙特做法）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia and the broader GCC region follow IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) as the standard AC EV charging connector for public and commercial EV supply equipment. The Gulf Standards Organization (GSO) has adopted GSO IEC 62196 covering EV plugs, socket-outlets, and vehicle couplers. Saudi electric vehicle infrastructure projects and Saudi Electricity Company (SEC) specifications reference IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging. Type 2 is a 7-pin connector supporting single-phase (up to 16 A / 3.7 kW) and three-phase (up to 32 A / 22 kW) AC charging with an integral locking mechanism. [NOTE: The specific GSO standard number (GSO IEC 62196) and its current adoption status in Saudi national regulation should be verified with SASO or on the SABER platform before product design commitment.]
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯及海湾合作委员会（GCC）地区将IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）作为公共及商业电动汽车供电设备的标准交流充电接口。海湾标准化组织（GSO）已采用涵盖电动汽车插头、插座及车辆耦合器的GSO IEC 62196标准。沙特电动汽车基础设施项目及沙特电力公司（SEC）规范均将IEC 62196-2 Type 2列为交流充电接口。Type 2为7针接口，支持单相（最高16A/3.7kW）及三相（最高32A/22kW）交流充电，并具有内置锁定机构。【注：GSO标准的具体编号（GSO IEC 62196）及其在沙特国家法规中的当前采纳状态，在产品设计确定前应向SASO核实或在SABER平台确认。】
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯及海灣合作委員會（GCC）地區將IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）作為公共及商業電動汽車供電設備的標準交流充電接口。海灣標準化組織（GSO）已採用涵蓋電動汽車插頭、插座及車輛耦合器的GSO IEC 62196標準。沙特電動汽車基礎設施項目及沙特電力公司（SEC）規範均將IEC 62196-2 Type 2列為交流充電接口。Type 2為7針接口，支持單相（最高16A/3.7kW）及三相（最高32A/22kW）交流充電，並具有內置鎖定機構。【注：GSO標準的具體編號（GSO IEC 62196）及其在沙特國家法規中的當前採納狀態，在產品設計確定前應向SASO核實或在SABER平台確認。】

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — AC pin and contact-tube accessories — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements (Type 2 / Mennekes)
GSO IEC 62196 — Gulf Standards Organization adoption of IEC 62196 series (verify current edition)
SASO SABER platform — product registration and PCoC for connector products

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2-2023 (Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler) for AC EV charging, which defines a physically distinct 7-pin connector with different pin geometry, contact dimensions, and housing shape from IEC 62196-2 Type 2. The two connectors are physically incompatible — a GB/T AC plug cannot mate with a Type 2 socket and vice versa. GB/T 20234.1-2023 covers the general requirements for the connection set. There is no mutual recognition or harmonisation between GB/T 20234.2 and IEC 62196-2.
summary.zh: 中国交流电动汽车充电采用GB/T 20234.2-2023（电动汽车传导充电用连接装置——第2部分：交流充电接口），定义了与IEC 62196-2 Type 2在针脚几何形状、触点尺寸及外壳形状上均不同的7针接口。两种接口物理不兼容——GB/T交流插头无法与Type 2插座配合，反之亦然。GB/T 20234.1-2023涵盖连接装置的通用要求。GB/T 20234.2与IEC 62196-2之间不存在互认或协调机制。
summary.zht: 中國交流電動汽車充電採用GB/T 20234.2-2023（電動汽車傳導充電用連接裝置——第2部分：交流充電接口），定義了與IEC 62196-2 Type 2在針腳幾何形狀、觸點尺寸及外殼形狀上均不同的7針接口。兩種接口物理不相容——GB/T交流插頭無法與Type 2插座配合，反之亦然。GB/T 20234.1-2023涵蓋連接裝置的通用要求。GB/T 20234.2與IEC 62196-2之間不存在互認或協調機制。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler (current edition)
GB/T 20234.1-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 1: General requirements (current edition)

gap.en: Critical hardware gap: The GB/T AC charging connector (GB/T 20234.2) and the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 connector are physically incompatible. A Chinese EV charger fitted with a GB/T Type 2 AC socket cannot be used with Type 2-equipped vehicles in Saudi Arabia, and vice versa. EV chargers exported from China to Saudi Arabia must be manufactured or retrofitted with IEC 62196-2 Type 2 sockets and vehicle inlets. This is a product design change — not a documentation-only gap. The connector body, pin count, and locking mechanism designs all differ despite both using 7 pins in a different configuration. No adapter is a permanent solution for public infrastructure compliance.
gap.zh: 关键硬件差距：GB/T交流充电接口（GB/T 20234.2）与IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口物理不兼容。配备GB/T Type 2交流插座的中国电动汽车充电桩无法在沙特阿拉伯为配备Type 2接口的车辆充电，反之亦然。从中国出口至沙特的电动汽车充电器，须制造时配备或改装为IEC 62196-2 Type 2插座及车辆接口。这是产品设计变更，而非仅文件差距。尽管两者均采用7针结构，但接口主体、针脚布局及锁定机构设计均不同。对于公共基础设施合规而言，转接头不是永久解决方案。
gap.zht: 關鍵硬體差距：GB/T交流充電接口（GB/T 20234.2）與IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口物理不相容。配備GB/T Type 2交流插座的中國電動汽車充電樁無法在沙特阿拉伯為配備Type 2接口的車輛充電，反之亦然。從中國出口至沙特的電動汽車充電器，須製造時配備或改裝為IEC 62196-2 Type 2插座及車輛接口。這是產品設計變更，而非僅文件差距。儘管兩者均採用7針結構，但接口主體、針腳佈局及鎖定機構設計均不同。對於公共基礎設施合規而言，轉接頭不是永久解決方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for Saudi/GCC EV charging infrastructure — IEC 62196-2 Type 2 required per GSO IEC 62196 and SEC project specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for EV sold in China — GB/T 20234.2-2023 under MIIT type-approval; no reciprocal recognition on Saudi side

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T AC charging connector (GB/T 20234.2) is physically incompatible with IEC 62196-2 Type 2 used in Saudi Arabia and the GCC. Exporters must redesign or re-specify the connector type before market entry — this is a hardware gap, not a documentation gap. Verify the specific GSO/SASO standard reference with SASO before finalising product specifications.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T交流充电接口（GB/T 20234.2）与沙特阿拉伯及GCC地区使用的IEC 62196-2 Type 2物理不兼容。出口商在进入市场前须重新设计或更换接口类型——这是硬件差距，而非文件差距。在最终确定产品规格前，请向SASO核实具体适用的GSO/SASO标准编号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T交流充電接口（GB/T 20234.2）與沙特阿拉伯及GCC地區使用的IEC 62196-2 Type 2物理不相容。出口商在進入市場前須重新設計或更換接口類型——這是硬體差距，而非文件差距。在最終確定產品規格前，請向SASO核實具體適用的GSO/SASO標準編號。

requirement_topic.en: DC EV Fast-Charging Connector Standard — IEC 62196-3 (CCS Combo 2 / CHAdeMO in Saudi Context)
requirement_topic.zh: 直流电动汽车快充接口标准——IEC 62196-3（沙特背景下的CCS Combo 2 / CHAdeMO）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流電動汽車快充接口標準——IEC 62196-3（沙特背景下的CCS Combo 2 / CHAdeMO）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia references IEC 62196-3 for DC fast-charging connectors in EV infrastructure projects. The GCC region has not yet mandated a single DC connector standard with the same legislative force as the EU's AFIR, but public infrastructure projects and SEC specifications increasingly reference CCS Combo 2 (IEC 62196-3 Configuration FF) as the preferred DC standard aligned with international practice. CHAdeMO (IEC 62196-3 Configuration AA) has a smaller installed base. [NOTE: Unlike the EU (which mandated CCS2 exclusively via AFIR), Saudi Arabia has not as of June 2026 issued a binding regulation mandating CCS2 over CHAdeMO to the same extent — verify the current Saudi/GSO position on DC connector standardisation before specifying product configuration.]
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯在电动汽车基础设施项目中引用IEC 62196-3作为直流快充接口标准。GCC地区尚未以与欧盟AFIR同等立法效力强制规定单一直流接口标准，但公共基础设施项目及沙特电力公司（SEC）规范正越来越多地将CCS Combo 2（IEC 62196-3 FF型配置）列为与国际实践接轨的首选直流标准。CHAdeMO（IEC 62196-3 AA型配置）的装机基础较小。【注：与欧盟（通过AFIR专项强制要求CCS2）不同，截至2026年6月，沙特尚未以同等力度颁布强制规定CCS2优于CHAdeMO的具有约束力的法规——在确定产品配置前，请核实沙特/GSO在直流接口标准化方面的当前立场。】
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯在電動汽車基礎設施項目中引用IEC 62196-3作為直流快充接口標準。GCC地區尚未以與歐盟AFIR同等立法效力強制規定單一直流接口標準，但公共基礎設施項目及沙特電力公司（SEC）規範正越來越多地將CCS Combo 2（IEC 62196-3 FF型配置）列為與國際實踐接軌的首選直流標準。CHAdeMO（IEC 62196-3 AA型配置）的裝機基礎較小。【注：與歐盟（通過AFIR專項強制要求CCS2）不同，截至2026年6月，沙特尚未以同等力度頒布強制規定CCS2優於CHAdeMO的具有約束力的法規——在確定產品配置前，請核實沙特/GSO在直流接口標準化方面的當前立場。】

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers (CCS Combo 2 = Configuration FF; CHAdeMO = Configuration AA)
GSO IEC 62196 — Gulf Standards Organization adoption of IEC 62196 series (verify current edition and scope)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.3-2023 (Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler) for DC fast charging, defining a 9-pin connector with different geometry from both CCS Combo 2 and CHAdeMO. GB/T 20234.3 is physically incompatible with IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 and with CHAdeMO. The communication protocol used with Chinese DC chargers is GB/T 27930 (CAN-based), whereas CCS Combo 2 uses ISO 15118 over PLC. No mutual recognition or harmonisation exists between GB/T 20234.3 and IEC 62196-3.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3-2023（电动汽车传导充电用连接装置——第3部分：直流充电接口），定义了与CCS Combo 2和CHAdeMO几何形状均不同的9针接口。GB/T 20234.3与IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2及CHAdeMO均物理不兼容。中国直流充电器使用的通信协议为GB/T 27930（基于CAN总线），而CCS Combo 2使用基于PLC的ISO 15118协议。GB/T 20234.3与IEC 62196-3之间不存在互认或协调机制。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3-2023（電動汽車傳導充電用連接裝置——第3部分：直流充電接口），定義了與CCS Combo 2和CHAdeMO幾何形狀均不同的9針接口。GB/T 20234.3與IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2及CHAdeMO均物理不相容。中國直流充電器使用的通訊協定為GB/T 27930（基於CAN匯流排），而CCS Combo 2使用基於PLC的ISO 15118協定。GB/T 20234.3與IEC 62196-3之間不存在互認或協調機制。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (current edition, up to 1500 V / 800 A)
GB/T 27930-2015 — Communication protocol between off-board charger and BMS of electric vehicle (CAN-based)

gap.en: Critical hardware gap: Chinese GB/T 20234.3 DC connectors are physically incompatible with both IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 and CHAdeMO used in Saudi Arabia. DC charging stations exported from China must be manufactured with or retrofitted to IEC 62196-3 connectors (CCS Combo 2 is the internationally prevalent standard and is referenced in Saudi infrastructure projects; verify project specification). The communication protocol also differs — GB/T 27930 CAN vs. ISO 15118 PLC for CCS2 — compounding the incompatibility beyond the physical plug. Hardware redesign is required; this is not a documentation gap.
gap.zh: 关键硬件差距：中国GB/T 20234.3直流接口与沙特阿拉伯使用的IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2和CHAdeMO均物理不兼容。从中国出口的直流充电站，须制造时配备或改装为IEC 62196-3接口（CCS Combo 2是国际主流标准，沙特基础设施项目中有所引用；请核实项目规格）。通信协议也不同——GB/T 27930基于CAN总线，而CCS2采用基于PLC的ISO 15118协议——进一步加剧了不兼容性，超出了物理插头层面。需要进行硬件重新设计；这不是文件差距。
gap.zht: 關鍵硬體差距：中國GB/T 20234.3直流接口與沙特阿拉伯使用的IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2和CHAdeMO均物理不相容。從中國出口的直流充電站，須製造時配備或改裝為IEC 62196-3接口（CCS Combo 2是國際主流標準，沙特基礎設施項目中有所引用；請核實項目規格）。通訊協定也不同——GB/T 27930基於CAN匯流排，而CCS2採用基於PLC的ISO 15118協定——進一步加劇了不相容性，超出了物理插頭層面。需要進行硬體重新設計；這不是文件差距。

mandatory_status.target: Required in practice for Saudi/GCC public DC fast-charging infrastructure — IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 is the dominant specification in new projects; binding regulation status should be verified with SASO
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for EV sold in China — GB/T 20234.3-2023 under MIIT type-approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 20234.3 DC connector is physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 and CHAdeMO. DC chargers exported from China to Saudi Arabia require hardware redesign to IEC 62196-3 and re-validation of communication protocols. The specific DC connector requirement for Saudi projects should be confirmed with the project authority or SASO, as binding regulatory standardisation on CCS2-only has not been confirmed at the same level as the EU AFIR mandate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 20234.3直流接口在物理和电气上均与IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2和CHAdeMO不兼容。从中国出口至沙特的直流充电器须将硬件重新设计为IEC 62196-3，并重新验证通信协议。沙特项目的具体直流接口要求应与项目主管机构或SASO确认，因为针对CCS2的具有约束力的强制性标准化尚未达到与欧盟AFIR授权相同的层级。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 20234.3直流接口在物理和電氣上均與IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2和CHAdeMO不相容。從中國出口至沙特的直流充電器須將硬體重新設計為IEC 62196-3，並重新驗證通訊協定。沙特項目的具體直流接口要求應與項目主管機構或SASO確認，因為針對CCS2的具有約束力的強制性標準化尚未達到與歐盟AFIR授權相同的層級。
